reason: Both answers correctly state the Section 412 grace rule and Fourth Estate registration requirement. Answer B adds a concrete actionable detail A lacks: cost and timeline for expedited registration (about 800 dollars, 5 to 10 business days), which is decision relevant if litigation is imminent. B also states the commencement rule more crisply. A offers a hedged circuit split caveat that is less actionable. B has a slight edge on usefulness.
